description: Executive view of SpectonCR — storage, image count, cost projection, mirror status, CVE posture. One-stop decision-making dashboard.

links.title: SpectonCR Operations Detail
links.tooltip: Per-tenant breakdown, image-size distribution, GC, CVE per repo

panels.title: Total images

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT manifest_digest)::BIGINT AS "images" FROM manifest_blob_refs WHERE ($__tenantFilter) OR ('${tenant:csv}' = '$$__all') OR (tenant = ANY(string_to_array('${tenant:csv}', ',')))

panels.description: Distinct manifest digests recorded by the GC refcount writer. Tenants whose 009 GC isn't enabled are not counted.

panels.title: Total storage

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(bytes), 0)::BIGINT AS "bytes" FROM blob_refcounts WHERE refcount > 0 AND (tenant = ANY(string_to_array('${tenant:csv}', ',')) OR '${tenant:csv}' = '$$__all')

panels.description: Sum of unique-blob bytes across the selected tenants. Refcount > 0 excludes blobs scheduled for reaping.

panels.title: Avg image size

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(per_manifest_bytes), 0)::BIGINT AS "bytes" FROM ( SELECT manifest_digest, SUM(bytes) AS per_manifest_bytes FROM manifest_blob_refs r JOIN blob_refcounts b ON b.tenant = r.tenant AND b.blob_digest = r.blob_digest WHERE (r.tenant = ANY(string_to_array('${tenant:csv}', ',')) OR '${tenant:csv}' = '$$__all') GROUP BY manifest_digest) t

panels.description: Mean bytes per manifest. Yellow > 500 MiB, red > 2 GiB — typical thresholds for 'audit your Dockerfile'.

panels.title: Projected monthly cost

targets.rawSql: WITH model AS ( SELECT (spec->>'egress_per_gb')::float8 AS egress_per_gb, (spec->>'storage_per_gb_month')::float8 AS storage_per_gb_month FROM cost_models ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1), egress30 AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes), 0)::float8 / 1e9 AS gb FROM usage_daily WHERE op = 'pull' AND bucket_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND (tenant = ANY(string_to_array('${tenant:csv}', ',')) OR '${tenant:csv}' = '$$__all')), storage AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes), 0)::float8 / 1e9 AS gb FROM blob_refcounts WHERE refcount > 0 AND (tenant = ANY(string_to_array('${tenant:csv}', ',')) OR '${tenant:csv}' = '$$__all')) SELECT NOW() AS time, ((SELECT gb FROM egress30) * COALESCE((SELECT egress_per_gb FROM model), 0.09)) + ((SELECT gb FROM storage) * COALESCE((SELECT storage_per_gb_month FROM model), 0.023)) AS "USD"

panels.description: Projection: last-30d egress × egress_per_gb + current storage × storage_per_gb_month. Falls back to AWS us-east-1 defaults when no CostModel is configured ($0.09/GB egress, $0.023/GB-month storage).

panels.title: Open critical+high CVEs

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "open" FROM findings f WHERE f.severity IN ('critical', 'high') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM suppressions s WHERE s.cve_id = f.finding_id AND s.detector = f.detector AND s.revoked_at IS NULL AND (s.expires_at IS NULL OR s.expires_at > NOW()))

panels.description: All findings of severity high or critical that are not actively suppressed. Numbers > 0 are operator-actionable.

panels.title: Mirror cache hit ratio
panels.description: Pull-through cache hit ratio over the last 5 minutes. Below 50%: upstream re-pulls dominate; review cache TTL or upstream rate limits.

panels.title: Storage trend (30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket_at AS time, tenant, SUM(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes FROM usage_daily WHERE op = 'push' AND bucket_at >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket_at <= $__timeTo() AND (tenant = ANY(string_to_array('${tenant:csv}', ',')) OR '${tenant:csv}' = '$$__all') GROUP BY bucket_at, tenant ORDER BY bucket_at

panels.description: Daily bytes pushed per tenant. Stacked area shows where the storage growth is coming from.

panels.title: Egress trend (30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket_at AS time, tenant, SUM(bytes)::BIGINT AS bytes FROM usage_daily WHERE op = 'pull' AND bucket_at >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket_at <= $__timeTo() AND (tenant = ANY(string_to_array('${tenant:csv}', ',')) OR '${tenant:csv}' = '$$__all') GROUP BY bucket_at, tenant ORDER BY bucket_at

panels.description: Daily bytes pulled per tenant — the dominant cost driver in most cloud bills.

panels.title: Top 10 tenants by storage

targets.rawSql: WITH model AS ( SELECT (spec->>'egress_per_gb')::float8 AS egress_per_gb, (spec->>'storage_per_gb_month')::float8 AS storage_per_gb_month FROM cost_models ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1), st AS ( SELECT tenant, SUM(bytes) AS bytes FROM blob_refcounts WHERE refcount > 0 GROUP BY tenant), eg AS ( SELECT tenant, SUM(bytes)::float8 / 1e9 AS gb FROM usage_daily WHERE op = 'pull' AND bucket_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY tenant), im AS ( SELECT tenant, COUNT(DISTINCT manifest_digest) AS images FROM manifest_blob_refs GROUP BY tenant) SELECT st.tenant, st.bytes, COALESCE(im.images, 0) AS images, ((COALESCE(eg.gb, 0) * COALESCE((SELECT egress_per_gb FROM model), 0.09)) + ((st.bytes::float8 / 1e9) * COALESCE((SELECT storage_per_gb_month FROM model), 0.023)))::numeric(12,2) AS monthly_cost_usd FROM st LEFT JOIN eg ON eg.tenant = st.tenant LEFT JOIN im ON im.tenant = st.tenant ORDER BY st.bytes DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description: Storage + image count + projected monthly cost per tenant. Sorted by storage descending.

panels.title: Top 10 tenants by CVE exposure

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.tenant, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'critical' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM suppressions sup WHERE sup.cve_id = f.finding_id AND sup.detector = f.detector AND sup.revoked_at IS NULL))::BIGINT AS critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'high' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM suppressions sup WHERE sup.cve_id = f.finding_id AND sup.detector = f.detector AND sup.revoked_at IS NULL))::BIGINT AS high, COUNT(DISTINCT f.digest)::BIGINT AS affected_images FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.digest = f.digest GROUP BY s.tenant ORDER BY critical DESC, high DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description: Tenants ranked by open Critical/High findings. Suppressions are honoured.

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM blob_refcounts ORDER BY tenant
list.label: Tenant
list.name: tenant
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM blob_refcounts ORDER BY tenant

title: SpectonCR — Enterprise Overview
